snapshot.founded: 1992 (Alpha Flying Club, Norwood MA); program launched September 9, 1995
snapshot.industry_position: Second oldest fractional aircraft program in the world

leadership_team.george_antoniadis: Founder, President & CEO — received Kenn Ricci Lifetime Aviation Entrepreneur Award, Feb 4, 2026
leadership_team.mandar_pendse: Chief Information Officer (CIO) — KEY Calfus contact
leadership_team.mike_baur: VP, Business Development & Strategy — strategic partnerships owner
leadership_team.kevin_gordon: VP, Flight Operations — operational systems owner

business_model.core_concept: Fractional jet ownership — clients purchase a share of an aircraft and gain access to the full fleet. PlaneSense manages all operations (crew, scheduling, maintenance, dispatch) on behalf of owners.
revenue_streams: Fractional share purchase (asset sale — 1/16th to full ownership)
Monthly management fees (fixed, per share — covers pilot comp, training, insurance, maintenance)
Occupied hourly flight fees (variable — per flight hour only, no repositioning fees)
CobaltPass jet card sales (prepaid block: hourly + fuel + landing + FBO fees)
PlaneSense Sourcing Solution (managed access fees for flights beyond own fleet)
Atlas Aircraft Center MRO services (sister company, in-house maintenance)

program_options.fractional_ownership: Core program — 50 hrs/year minimum, 5-7 year terms, no blackout dates, no peak pricing
program_options.cobaltpass: 25-hr jet card launched May 2025 — sold out by Feb 2026, 12-month commitment, 24/7 IOC access
program_options.sourcing_solution: Launched Aug 2025 — access to flights beyond own fleet, nationally and internationally

pricing_structure.transparency_claim: All costs disclosed upfront. Owners pay only for occupied flight hours — no repositioning fees, no hidden charges
pricing_structure.tax_advantage: 100% bonus depreciation on share purchase for business use — full purchase price deductible in year placed in service
pricing_structure.fee_free_positioning: No fuel surcharges, no de-icing fees, no FBO fees, no minimum flight times, no pet fees, no destination surcharges within Standard Billing Area

customer_segments.business_executives: C-suite, company owners, multi-site operators. 59% of private aviation users have companies under 500 employees (NBAA stat). Use cases: client meetings, multi-city tours, competitive time advantage, productivity, privacy
customer_segments.affluent_leisure: Families, second-home owners, outdoor enthusiasts (golfers, hunters, fishermen, skiers), sporting event travelers
customer_segments.pet_travelers: 3,696 pets flew in 2021 (+21% vs. 2019) — actively marketed differentiator
customer_segments.international: Nantucket, Bahamas, Bermuda, Caribbean, now Europe via Jetfly/CaptainJet
customer_segments.retention_depth: 91% retention; some families span 3 generations of PlaneSense ownership

pc24_jet.positioning: #2 light jet (BJT readers); world launch customer
pc24_jet.latest_upgrade: Extended payload and range — first improved unit delivered December 2023

fleet_details.fleet_philosophy: Intentionally young fleet (avg 4.5 yrs). Exclusive Pilatus — no mixed-manufacturer fleet. All maintenance in-house via Atlas Aircraft Center.

safety: ARGUS Platinum Elite — one of only 5 U.S. aviation companies with this rating; held since 2016
IS-BAO (International Standard for Business Aircraft Operations) registered
maintenance: FAA Diamond Award for Excellence — every year since 2002
AEA Avionics Training Excellence Award — annually for many years
customer_service: BJT Annual Survey 2024: #1 in 5 of 6 categories including Overall Satisfaction (4.0/5), Peak Day Policies (4.0/5), Availability (4.0/5)
Professional Pilot Magazine: Flight Department of the Year (2019)
awards_and_recognition.leadership: George Antoniadis — Kenn Ricci Lifetime Aviation Entrepreneur Award, Living Legends of Aviation, Feb 2026

strategic_partnerships.jetfly: Launched April 2025 — largest European fractional operator, 400+ European owners, 3,000+ European airports. Reciprocal hour sharing between PlaneSense and Jetfly fleets.
strategic_partnerships.captainjet: Launched December 2025 — luxury European charter access, 7,000+ aircraft network, Lausanne Switzerland
strategic_partnerships.pilatus_aircraft: OEM partner — PlaneSense world launch customer for PC-24; received 2,000th PC-12 built at ceremony in Stans, Switzerland (2023)
strategic_partnerships.flightsafety_international: Training partner — jointly developed MissionFit simulator training; full-motion simulator in Dallas TX
strategic_partnerships.gozen_digital: Web-based flight scheduling platform — contract extended October 2023; CEO signaled appetite to expand cooperation

confirmed_tech_stack.hubspot: Marketing CRM — portal ID 8835121, lead capture, content downloads, marketing automation
confirmed_tech_stack.gogo_avance_l3: Fleet-wide in-flight Wi-Fi (PC-24 since 2018, PC-12 completed 2023)
confirmed_tech_stack.client_app: Confirmed via testimonial — self-service scheduling for owners
notable_absences: No ERP (Oracle, SAP, Workday) mentioned anywhere
No AI or machine learning mentioned anywhere
No data analytics or BI platform mentioned
No modern maintenance management system mentioned
